cards.back: A centralized repository that provides business users with historical data and analysis to support decision-making.
Systems that analyze data to support decision-making, but often lack the ability to handle large amounts of historical data.
The use of data and analytics to support business decision-making and strategy development.
Small, focused repositories of data that are used to support decision-making in specific business areas.
Technologies that enable business users to analyze and visualize data in a more interactive and flexible way.
